name: ERP Testing and Scenarios Knowledge Pack
description: Installable knowledge pack of original, concise patterns for testing an ERP generated by LocalAIFactory. Covers xUnit unit-test patterns for ERP invariants (ledger balance, negative-stock rejection, maker-checker and RBAC negative tests, posted-document immutability, audit-trail assertions), Playwright end-to-end patterns (login flow, page-renders/no-HTTP-500 smoke tests, data-testid selector discipline), the rule that scenarios must assert business invariants rather than status codes, and fourteen real-life ERP business scenarios expressed as test specs: quote-to-cash, procure-to-pay, month-end journal entries, customer and supplier onboarding approval, high-value payment approval, BOM-to-work-order, quality-inspection failure, support-ticket escalation, asset maintenance, HR onboarding, POS sale, multi-company transactions, and credit-limit enforcement. Each item carries applicability, a worked example, a required limitation, a confidence level, and tags.
license: Original professional summaries of established software-testing and ERP-scenario practice, authored for LocalAIFactory. Free to deploy and modify within the application. No vendor documentation, ERPNext/Frappe text, or third-party copyrighted material is reproduced verbatim. Practices are framed honestly with confidence levels; no certification is asserted.
